task_completion.description: Verify that a new item was created with the type set to 'Patent'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand details pane of the Jurism application, the 'Item Type' field should display 'Patent'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct title was entered for the patent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field in the Jurism details pane should contain 'Device, method, and graphical user interface for unlocking a device by performing gestures on an unlock image' (or at least the fragment 'unlocking a device').

task_completion.description: Verify that the creator role is set to 'Inventor' and the name is Freddy A. Anzures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the creator section of the details pane, the role dropdown should show 'Inventor', the last name field should show 'Anzures', and the first name field should show 'Freddy A.'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Assignee is set to Apple Inc.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Assignee' field in the Jurism details pane should contain 'Apple Inc.'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Patent Number is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Patent Number' field in the Jurism details pane should contain 'US 8046721 B2'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Date is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Date' or 'Issue Date' field in the Jurism details pane should contain '2011-10-25'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the Jurism graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jurism application window with its standard three-pane layout being actively used, rather than a text editor or web browser.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or script editors should be visible showing SQLite commands or scripts directly modifying the Jurism database.

integrity.description: Verify that the data was actually entered into the application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The requested information must be visible inside the specific input fields of the Jurism application's right-hand pane, not just printed on the screen or pasted into a single generic text box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: The expected patent title includes the fragment 'unlocking a device'. The expected patent number is 'US 8046721 B2'. The expected assignee is 'Apple Inc.'. The expected inventor last name is 'Anzures'. The expected date is '2011-10-25'.
